lifecycle.name: Pre-Close
lifecycle.description: Title search, commitment, lien clearance, disclosure preparation

lifecycle.name: Closing
lifecycle.description: Escrow management, closing disclosure, FIRPTA, commission, HOA estoppel

workers.name: The Escrow Locker
workers.capabilitySummary: The Escrow Locker — manages the full lifecycle of an escrow transaction from offer acceptance through disbursement and recording. Enforces identity verification, wire security, condition satisfaction, and audit retention across all parties and stages.

workers.name: Wire Fraud Prevention
workers.capabilitySummary: Wire Fraud Prevention — validates wire instructions, detects domain mismatches, enforces callback verification, and flags suspicious patterns before any funds are disbursed.

workers.name: Title Search and Commitment
workers.capabilitySummary: Title Search and Commitment — processes title searches, classifies exceptions in Schedule B, identifies deal-killer defects, tracks curative actions, and produces commitment documents for underwriting.

workers.name: Lien Clearance
workers.capabilitySummary: Lien Clearance — tracks existing liens on the property, coordinates payoff demands, monitors release recordings, and blocks DTC transfer and closing until all liens are satisfied and released.

workers.name: Disclosure Package
workers.capabilitySummary: Disclosure Package — manages state-specific disclosure requirements, tracks delivery confirmation, handles HOA document collection, and blocks closing when mandatory disclosures are missing.

workers.name: Closing Disclosure
workers.capabilitySummary: Closing Disclosure — generates and validates Closing Disclosure (CD) and HUD-1 settlement statements, enforces TRID tolerance checks, verifies proration accuracy, and blocks signing and disbursement when discrepancies exist.

workers.name: FIRPTA and 1031 Exchange
workers.capabilitySummary: FIRPTA and 1031 Exchange — enforces FIRPTA withholding requirements for foreign sellers, manages IRC Section 1031 exchange timelines and identification rules, tracks qualified intermediary coordination, and blocks closing or exchange completion when compliance gaps exist.

workers.name: Commission Reconciliation
workers.capabilitySummary: Commission Reconciliation — reconciles agent commissions, broker splits, referral fees, and transaction coordinator fees against the settlement statement. Blocks disbursement when totals do not balance or trust accounts are unverified.

workers.name: HOA Estoppel
workers.capabilitySummary: HOA Estoppel — requests and processes HOA estoppel certificates, tracks unpaid dues and special assessments, monitors transfer fees, and blocks closing when outstanding HOA obligations or pending litigation exist.

workers.name: Status Portal
workers.capabilitySummary: Status Portal — provides real-time transaction status to authorized parties, enforces access control, masks PII in status views, and notifies parties of condition changes, stage advances, and approaching deadlines.

workers.name: Recording Monitor
workers.capabilitySummary: Recording Monitor — tracks document recording with county recorder offices, monitors e-recording submissions, confirms recording numbers, and blocks DTC transfer until recording is confirmed. Handles recording rejections and document corrections.

workers.name: Alex Chief of Staff for Title and Escrow
workers.capabilitySummary: Alex Chief of Staff for Title and Escrow — monitors all active Escrow Lockers, surfaces anomalies and stalled transactions, escalates unresolved wire fraud alerts, provides daily briefings, and tracks stage breakdowns across the portfolio.
